programme.title: The Trafford Centre: Countdown to Christmas
programme.desc: Behind the scenes of the Manchester shopping centre as preparations for the festive season commence, with events manager Nikki Tansey spearheading operations for the first time. Ensuring the right atmosphere is everything, and Nikki heads to a Huddersfield supplier to pick up an incredible 50 miles of fairy lights, as well as enough baubles to fill a swimming pool, while also trying to book a celebrity for the switch-on ceremony

programme.title: The Trafford Centre: Countdown to Christmas
programme.desc: In the second of two programmes following Christmas preparations at the shopping centre, events manager Nikki puts the staff to work setting up approximately £1million worth of decorations - but they have just 10 nights to get everything ready. Although the task is completed on time, a further problem emerges when X Factor's Fleur East, who was signed up to switch on the lights, reveals she is no longer able to make it. Meanwhile, a teenage employee faces a tough night, and Father Christmas decides to trade in his famous sleigh to arrive at the Trafford Centre in one of Manchester's brand new water taxis

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: Divine Designs
programme.desc: Cambridge academic Paul Binski continues his fact-finding journey through the history of religious art, visiting St Giles in Cheadle, Staffordshire, and the Free Church in Glasgow to see how Augustus Pugin and Alexander 'Greek' Thomson, two notable Victorian architects, rejected the prevailing industrialism of their era and drew inspiration from the grandeur of the past

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice offers advice to a divorcing couple trying to sell their three-bedroom Victorian semi in Camberley, Surrey. The main problems are smelly furniture, unfinished DIY jobs and a caravan blocking the driveway, so the team gives the place a lick of paint and a clean

programme.title: Sorry, Wrong Number (1948)
programme.desc: Rich, neurotic Leona Stevenson lies bedridden at home and is trying to phone her husband. But the lines are crossed, and she accidentally overhears a call in which two men are planning a murder. She frantically tries to raise the alarm, and when at last she manages to convince the telephone company of her story, she comes to realise with increasing horror who their intended victim is. Thriller, starring Barbara Stanwyck, Burt Lancaster, Ann Richards and Wendell Corey

programme.title: Hell Is for Heroes (1962)
programme.desc: A rebellious soldier defies orders to lead two men on a secret attack on a German pillbox, but his mission fails and the other two soldiers are killed. Court-martialled for his actions, he remains convinced his plan was sound and ignores the sentence to make a second attempt at destroying the emplacement. Second World War adventure, with Steve McQueen, James Coburn and Bobby Darin

programme.title: Angel and the Badman (1947)
programme.desc: A gunslinger determined to track down his father's killer is badly wounded and taken in by a Quaker family, whose daughter nurses him back to health. His attraction to the girl and growing respect for the family's peaceful way of life lead him to consider renouncing violence - but his desire for revenge proves hard to surrender. Western, starring John Wayne, Bruce Cabot and Gail Russell

programme.title: Carry On Regardless (1961)
programme.desc: A businessman starts up an odd-job agency, but employs seven hopeless handymen incapable of completing any task without causing utter chaos. Matters come to a head when their landlord tries to evict them - forcing the bungling workmen to finally prove their worth. Slapstick comedy, starring Sid James, Charles Hawtrey and Kenneth Williams

programme.title: The Book Thief (2013)
programme.desc: A girl separated from her family is raised by foster parents in Nazi Germany, who instill in her a love of reading. She is horrified by the book burnings and tries to save volumes from the flames, while she and her adoptive family provide a safe hiding place for a Jewish boy. Drama based on Markus Zusak's novel, starring Sophie Nelisse, Geoffrey Rush and Emily Watson

programme.title: Transporter 3 (2008)
programme.desc: Underworld courier Frank Martin's latest assignment involves transporting the kidnapped daughter of a crooked government minister across Europe on behalf of an eco-terrorist faction. However, a device will kill him if he leaves his car, thugs employed by the politician are out to murder him, and his passenger has a bad case of Stockholm syndrome. Action thriller sequel, with Jason Statham and Natalya Rudakova

programme.title: Ghost in the Shell (2017)
programme.desc: A cybernetically enhanced soldier designed to battle the world's deadliest criminals faces a new threat - a terrorist who has developed the ability to hack into people's minds and control them. The mission brings to light disturbing secrets about her own past, and the possibility that her whole life is a lie. Sci-fi adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Pilou Asbæk and Juliette Binoche

programme.title: The Handmaiden (2016)
programme.desc: A conman posing as a count hires a petty criminal to help him marry a Japanese heiress by becoming her handmaiden and persuading her to accept his proposal. Psychological thriller based on Sarah Waters' bestselling novel Fingersmith, starring Kim Min-hee, Kim Tae-ri, Ha Jung-woo and Cho Jin-woong. In Korean and English

programme.title: Zoo (2017)
programme.desc: During the 1941 German air raids on Belfast, a young lad inadvertently becomes the protector of a baby elephant after his zoo-owning father is sent to fight. Can he and his friends save Buster from being put down? Family drama, starring Toby Jones, Penelope Wilton and Art Parkinson

programme.title: Rugrats in Paris: The Movie (2000)
programme.desc: The lucky little tots embark on a trip to a French theme park - but while the rest of the gang are intent on enjoying themselves, Chuckie is distracted by his wish for a new mum. He sets his sights on the owner of the amusement park as a prospective partner for his single dad. Animated adventure, with the voices of Christine Cavanaugh, Elizabeth Daily, Cheryl Chase, Kath Soucie and Susan Sarandon

programme.title: The Longest Day (1962)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War drama chronicling the planning and execution of the Allied landings in Normandy on June 6, 1944, from the differing perspectives of the British, German, French and American forces. Starring Richard Burton, Richard Todd, Kenneth More, Sean Connery, John Wayne, Robert Mitchum, Henry Fonda, Curt Jurgens, Roddy McDowall and Rod Steiger

programme.title: Independence Day (1996)
programme.desc: A fleet of huge flying saucers launches a devastating and unprovoked attack on Earth. As survivors try to flee the seemingly unstoppable alien invaders, the courageous US president, an ace pilot and a computer genius come up with a plan to take the fight to the enemy and save the human race. Roland Emmerich's sci-fi adventure, starring Will Smith, Bill Pullman, Jeff Goldblum, Mary McDonnell, Randy Quaid, Robert Loggia and Harry Connick Jr

programme.title: The Great Wall (2016)
programme.desc: In the 11th century, a group of Europeans set out for China to discover how to make gunpowder. However, on arrival their claims to be on a trading mission are disbelieved and they are arrested and imprisoned by the Nameless Order within the Great Wall - just as it is about to be beset by giant, lizard-like monsters. As wave after wave of attacks and surprise tactics batter the Wall, Europeans and Chinese battle hoards of the alien creatures in a series of escalating conflicts leading to a final confrontation with the alien queen. Fantasy adventure, starring Matt Damon, Willem Dafoe and Tian Jing

programme.title: Baywatch (2017)
programme.desc: A veteran lifeguard commands a highly trained team that keeps the sun-kissed resort of Emerald Bay safe. As he breaks in some new recruits - including an insubordinate former Olympic swimmer - he has to contend with a dangerous new drug sweeping the beach. Action comedy based on the TV series, starring Dwayne Johnson, Zac Efron, Alexandra Daddario and Priyanka Chopra

programme.title: Rings (2017)
programme.desc: A young woman finds herself on the receiving end of a terrifying curse that threatens to take her life in seven days. Horror, starring Matilda Anna Ingrid Lutz, Alex Roe and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: Madagascar (2005)
programme.desc: A gang of streetwise penguins decides to escape from New York's Central Park Zoo and return to a life in the wild, but when Marty the zebra and his friends follow suit, they end up stranded in Africa on a jungle island without a clue about how to fend for themselves. Animated comedy, with the voices of Ben Stiller, David Schwimmer, Chris Rock, Jada Pinkett Smith and Sacha Baron Cohen

programme.title: Sunshine on Leith (2013)
programme.desc: Two soldiers return home to the Scottish port town after finishing their tour of duty in Afghanistan. While they struggle to adjust to life as civilians, the parents of one of the squaddies prepare to celebrate their 30th anniversary in style. Musical featuring songs by the Proclaimers, starring George MacKay, Kevin Guthrie, Peter Mullan and Jane Horrocks

programme.title: Carry On Constable (1960)
programme.desc: A flu epidemic leaves a police station short of staff, forcing a desperate inspector to send four bungling trainees on the beat. The inept would-be bobbies manage to increase the crime rate even before they have started work, and their long-suffering sergeant faces an uphill battle to whip them into shape. Comedy, starring Sid James, Kenneth Williams, Kenneth Connor, Charles Hawtrey and Joan Sims

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)
programme.desc: Singleton Jane is literally always the bridesmaid and never the bride, a role she assumes for the 28th time when her sister announces she is getting married - to a man Jane is secretly in love with. As she wrestles with her feelings, Jane's predicament attracts the attention of a reporter fascinated by her story. Romantic comedy, starring Katherine Heigl, James Marsden and Malin Akerman

programme.title: Snow White & the Huntsman (2012)
programme.desc: An evil queen learns that her reign will last for ever if she kills a princess, so sends a renowned warrior to find and murder her. However, he comes to realise his mistress's evil ways, and instead trains his intended victim to fight so they can bring the tyrant's rule to an end. Fantasy adventure, with Kristen Stewart, Chris Hemsworth and Charlize Theron

programme.title: The Hitman's Bodyguard (2017)
programme.desc: A disgraced bodyguard is hired to protect a hitman about to testify against the tyrannical president of Belarus at the International Criminal Court in exchange for the release of his wife from prison. Comedy action thriller, starring Ryan Reynolds, Samuel L Jackson, Gary Oldman and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Kiss the Girls (1997)
programme.desc: A forensic psychologist hunts for a serial kidnapper stalking a university campus and responsible for his niece's disappearance. Working out of his jurisdiction, he defies local law enforcement officials to get to the truth - with the aid of one of the criminal's past victims, a headstrong doctor determined to see her former captor brought to justice. Thriller, starring Morgan Freeman, Ashley Judd, Cary Elwes and Tony Goldwyn

programme.title: Along Came a Spider (2001)
programme.desc: A police forensic psychologist searches for the daughter of a senator, who has been kidnapped from her expensive private school by a media-obsessed teacher, sparking a desperate race to hunt down her psychotic and devilishly intelligent captor before it is too late. Thriller prequel to Kiss the Girls, starring Morgan Freeman, Monica Potter, Michael Wincott, Dylan Baker and Penelope Ann Miller

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCool's, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzio's two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted tires of having to take long trips to New Jersey to see Stella and is aghast when she tells him she wants to live there once they marry - resulting in a row. Meanwhile, Robin hands in her notice but has to grovel for her job back when she is turned down at an interview for another position

programme.title: How I Met Your Mother
programme.desc: Ted prepares to move to New Jersey and argues with Marshall over who should pay a bill for the flat. The friends also reminisce about years gone by, and Barney poses as an old man. With Josh Radnor, Alyson Hannigan and Neil Patrick Harris

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: Adam is given two tickets to a Pittsburgh Steelers game by a client, and must choose whether to take Andi or Don. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Man with a Plan
programme.desc: When Adam gets fed up with endless demands from his daughter's kindergarten teacher, Mrs Rodriguez, he makes a hasty decision that lands him in hot water with his wife Andi

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry gets the chance to throw the first pitch at a Phillies baseball game and believes this represents his opportunity to play professionally, but he couldn't be more wrong. Meanwhile, Erica makes an important decision about her future in college

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam tries to start a Mel Brooks club after he sees the movie Spaceballs, but Jackie mistakes his club advertisement for political satire and puts it in the school paper. When Beverly and Pops come up for parents' weekend at college, Erica plans to tell them about an important decision she has made, but Murray surprises everyone by tagging along

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta goes to extremes trying to impress Santiago's father at Thanksgiving dinner. Boyle is on turkey duty, and Holt helps Pimento deal with no longer being able to work for the NYPD

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When a famous author receives death threats, Peralta and Jeffords take the case so that Jeffords can meet his lifelong hero. Gina wants to choose the location of the annual Boyle family vacation, and Santiago gets in the middle of a fight between Captain Holt and Kevin

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster makes a scientific breakthrough at the dentist's office. Dale and Meemaw go to the casino and Georgie makes a big mistake when he is left in charge of the store

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The eccentric youngster discovers that Mary has been keeping a secret about his future. Meemaw is furious when she learns Dale fired Georgie

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy take a train ride to the Napa Valley with Howard and Bernadette on Valentine's Day, while Leonard and Penny head to the vets when they volunteer to look after Raj's dog. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: JD is admitted with a case of appendicitis, and gets to see the hospital from a patient's perspective - but makes it clear he does not trust Turk to operate on him. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Scrubs
programme.desc: A patient irritates Dr Cox, who takes his anger out on JD, prompting Carla to leap to her intern's rescue. Meanwhile, Turk fights for the right to eat his lunch on a bench already claimed by Dr Kelso. Comedy, starring Zach Braff and Donald Faison

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: When JJ discovers that there's a sled hockey team made up entirely of people with disabilities, he immediately wants to join it, but Jimmy isn't thrilled because he thinks it's dangerous

programme.title: Speechless
programme.desc: As Christmas arrives, Maya surprises everyone by embracing a new-found holiday spirit. However, her mood is put to the test when the family's van is stolen, along with all their holiday gifts. Worried that he won't get into college, Ray tries to enhance his CV by joining the school choir. He is given a coveted solo spot but faces competition from JJ

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members head to the annual Tri-State Cop-Con event, which is usually their excuse for a big party. However, their fun is threatened when Captain Holt asks them to be on their best behaviour.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Amy vanishes shortly before she is due to take her sergeant's exam, leaving Jake and Rosa with just a few hours to find her and bring her back to sit the test before it is too late. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Furnero

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry realises that as a future doctor, he should be more concerned about Murray's health, so he enlists the Jenkintown Posse and Coach Mellor to help get his father in shape. Meanwhile, Beverly is horrified to learn that Erica and Adam don't want any of the priceless heirlooms in her fancy, never-really-used living room

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry thinks he wants a wild, adult bachelor party, but he soon realises Adam's idea of a soiree to celebrate his brother as a bachelor is not to his liking. Murray never spends money on himself, so Beverly decides to surprise him with an expensive sports car

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the seventh series finale, Sheldon becomes upset about his career, the destruction of the comic-book store and Leonard and Penny's future living arrangements. Elsewhere, Howard is unable to keep hold of a carer for his mother. Comedy, staring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Amy are forced to take an unexpected road trip to Arizona to pick up Sheldon after his epic railway journey ends in chaos. Meanwhile, Howard finds Stuart's relationship with his mother strange, and Penny has an interview for a sales job at Bernadette's workplace. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Hollyoaks Favourites
programme.desc: Looking back at a classic episode from 2000. The arrival of Ben Davies makes an impression on Cindy and Mandy. Lewis and Finn prepare to open their new club, The Loft

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam's birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast. Erica begins working at Murray's furniture store to pay off her parking tickets

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard, Raj and Howard go camping to watch the Leonid meteor shower, but the trip takes an unexpected turn thanks to some specially baked cookies. Meanwhile, Penny injures herself in the shower, and with the rest of the gang out of town, it's left to Sheldon to come to her aid

programme.title: X-Men: Days of Future Past (2014)
programme.desc: In a future ravaged by war, the superhero team makes a desperate last stand against a force of deadly robots. Their only hope is to send Wolverine back in time to the 1970s, to join forces with an earlier version of the X-Men and change the events that started the conflict. Superhero adventure sequel uniting the casts of the original movie and prequel First Class, starring Hugh Jackman, Jennifer Lawrence, James McAvoy and Michael Fassbender

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Teenager Buffy Summers moves to the town of Sunnydale, where she hopes to put her destiny of single-handedly fighting the forces of darkness behind her - only to find her new home town is crawling with vampires. Supernatural drama, starring Sarah Michelle Gellar and Nicholas Brendon

programme.title: Angel
programme.desc: A nerdy millionaire employs Angel to track down his blackmailer, but the investigation leads the sleuth into the crossfire of a gang war between street kids and vampires. Here, he meets Charles Gunn, a gangster-turned-vampire-hunter hoping to clear his neighbourhood of demons. Supernatural drama, starring David Boreanaz and J August Richards

programme.title: Rick and Morty
programme.desc: When 27 Ricks from alternate dimensions are murdered and their respective Mortys are kidnapped, Rick is framed for committing the crimes and must go after culprit - resulting in a fall-out with Morty

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of shows aired in October 2018. Programmes under consideration include This Morning at the Royal Wedding of Princess Eugenie, The Great Model Railway Challenge, The Last Leg, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve and Horizon - Avalanche: Making a Deadly Snowstorm

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nahida from Liverpool is searching for a man who shares her passion for food, and her date is with fellow Liverpudlian Thomas, who describes himself as a loveable bear. Ex-cruise ship worker Dale, 46, has been single for five years since his partner passed away, but is now ready to put his faith in Cupid again, and his date is 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of the Olde Stone Mill restaurant in Tuckahoe, New York, which is struggling to attract customers, leading to debts of nearly $1million. Gordon feels the owner is more interested in his own appearance than how his food tastes and a screaming match ensues

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppi's in Macomb Township, Michigan. Father and son Joe and Sam Borgia's constant fighting is driving customers away, and Gordon discovers one of the restaurateurs is concealing a serious health problem. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Thrill junkie Lee plans to push his unadventurous bride Aimee to the extreme with a wedding that would send most brides over the edge. While Aimee wanted to play it safe with a picturesque traditional event, Lee hopes she'll take a leap of faith to be his wife

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: As Verity and new boy Charlie grow closer, Maeva returns with a scandalous secret that could rip the group apart. Back in Chelsea, Zara and Melissa's friendship is on the rocks, but their friends are determined to bring them back together

programme.title: The SpongeBob Movie: Sponge Out of Water (2015)
programme.desc: The cheery sea creature tries to prevent a precious secret formula from falling into the wrong hands - but when it goes missing, the end of the world approaches. SpongeBob and his friends embark on a quest to get it back, which leads to them developing superpowers and venturing onto dry land. Animated comedy, with the voices of Tom Kenny and Antonio Banderas

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The competition starts to heat up during Chocolate Week, as Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three tricky challenges to test the remaining bakers. There's a deceptively simple traybake in the Signature, a Technical packed full of chocolate and nuts, and a celebration Showstopper that pushes the bakers' skills with white chocolate to the limit. Who will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Presented by Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers
programme.desc: Michele Wibowo is commissioned by a publishing company to create a cake that looks identical to a set of four legal volumes - all the way down to the leather binding and gold leaf inscriptions. In Lancaster, Molly Robbins embarks on a cake designed to be the same shape - and size - of a Shetland pony

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: While investigating a serial killer, Peralta enlists Holt's help in an attempt to solve the case without the new captain finding out. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with the murderer's demands, while Jeffords discovers a new obsession. Comedy, guest starring Kyra Sedgwick and Dean Winters, with Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Holt split the squad into two teams to help them win the Halloween heist contest. Each side attempts to steal the same item, a fancy-dress crown locked in a briefcase in the interrogation room in order to claim the title of 'amazing detective or genius'

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Charles take Terry on a camping trip to help him deal with stress. Amy gets Gina to help her persuade the police department to buy a product she invented as a child. Holt helps Rosa to break up with Marcus. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and Amy work together on a case, but wind up arguing over Jake's old, worn-out mattress. Meanwhile, Boyle scratches Holt's prized car, and the teenage boy Rosa sponsors as a 'big brother' is in trouble with the law. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake is left looking after Terry's pregnant wife, only for panic to set in when her waters break sooner than expected. A computer outage forces Amy and Charles to process all the paperwork by hand. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Megamind (2010)
programme.desc: An evil genius finally succeeds in killing the superhero who has foiled his every evil scheme, but finds life without an enemy boring. To fill the gap, he transforms an ordinary man into a worthy adversary - but when his creation turns evil, it falls to the villain to save the world. Animated comedy, with the voices of Will Ferrell, Tina Fey and Brad Pitt

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon finds himself forced to keep a secret when Penny decides to tell him what happened on her disappointing first date with Leonard. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is dejected to see Penny with another man and decides to cut his losses by going back to fellow scientist Leslie Winkle - a move that upsets Sheldon. Starring Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Sara Gilbert

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny becomes addicted to an online game based on the world of Conan the Barbarian. As her obsession intensifies, she begins to neglect her friends and seeks the company of the usually snide Sheldon, whom she continually pesters for advice. Starring Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Elated at being named one of People magazine's '30 to Watch Under 30', Raj makes a pass at Penny and becomes very arrogant, making it hard for Leonard to maintain a positive perspective on his friend's new-found confidence. Guest starring Charlie Sheen

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is forced to confront his fear of driving when both Penny and Howard refuse to give him a lift to work. Desperate to be free of the obligation, Leonard and the gang intervene to discover why their friend never learnt to drive. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki, with Octavia Spencer

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is flattered when a graduate student takes a shine to him, but she thinks his social life is distracting him from his work and removes him from his limited circle of friends by forcing him to work on a troublesome scientific problem. Guest starring Riki Lindhome

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's TV breaks down, so she heads to the boys' flat to watch her favourite shows. However, Sheldon tires of her presence and bans future visits, leading to an embarrassing form of retaliation. Meanwhile, Howard and Raj search for the America's Next Top Model house

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to the Channel 4 network, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Hugh Dennis, Joe Lycett, Lolly Adefope, Mel Giedroyc and Noel Fielding fell rubber ducks and destroy a cake to impress the very demanding Greg Davies

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies hosts more surreal celebrity challenges, as Lolly Adefope tries long distance painting, and Hugh Dennis is befuddled by an egg

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their insightful, passionate and sometimes emotional critiques of the week's biggest and best shows. Programmes under consideration include The Haunting of Hill House, Strictly Come Dancing, Killing Eve, Crikey! It's the Irwins, and the news. First aired in November 2018

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their views of Louis Theroux's Altered States: Love Without Limits, Sheridan Smith: Coming Home, The Secret Life of the Zoo, The Chase, The Haunting of Hill House and Killing Eve. From November 2018

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nahida from Liverpool is searching for a man who shares her passion for food, and her date is with fellow Liverpudlian Thomas, who describes himself as a loveable bear. Ex-cruise ship worker Dale, 46, has been single for five years since his partner passed away, but is now ready to put his faith in Cupid again, and his date is 39-year-old massage therapist Chris

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Singletons include political activist Lettie, who is 23 and looking for her intellectual equal, but despite being clued-up on politics, she is clueless on love. Meanwhile, octogenarian Doreen is not ready to give up on love and wants a man to keep her on her toes. Her date is 86-year-old author James

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Geoff vows to rekindle Erica's interest in music, so she auditions for a college singing group. Beverly forces Adam and Murray to go camping together, hoping it will help them bond

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Adam's birthday arrives, Beverly takes drastic measures to keep him from growing up too fast. Erica begins working at Murray's furniture store to pay off her parking tickets

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: In an attempt to solve an international jewel theft case, Peralta and Diaz are forced to work with a pair of Swedish detectives and things get very competitive, very quickly. Santiago and Jeffords offer to help Gina prepare for an examination, and Captain Holt enlists Boyle as his squash partner for an important tournament. Anders Holm and Riki Lindhome guest star

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta, Boyle and Gina get involved in a Die Hard-type hostage situation while doing some off-duty shopping on Christmas Eve, so Jeffords is forced to leave his family celebration to try to save his squad. Santiago attempts to prove that she's just as tough as Captain Holt and Diaz. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Omnibus. Felix plans revenge on his childhood abuser. Sienna and Brody hope to bring their baby home, while Liberty struggles with the strength of her feelings for the newborn

programme.title: Wife Swap USA
programme.desc: Two more American couples temporarily switch spouses, with woman whose husband is obsessed with cleaning swapping with a party-goer whose three-year-old son stays up all night

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day approaches, Barry is shocked when an attractive teaching assistant agrees to go out with him. Meanwhile, Adam and Dana worry that they've missed their chance with their new crushes

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With Dave Kim's parents out of town for the weekend, Adam decides to throw a party to impress Brea. Beverly lets fame go to her head after her cookbook is published

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam is thrilled when William Penn institutes a new open lunch policy, but Beverly has other plans. Geoff gets more than he bargained for when he uses Barry's student ID

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle and Genevieve want to take their relationship to a new level, but his ex-wife disrupts their plans. Santiago asks Jeffords to write a letter of recommendation for her, while Holt and Diaz enlist Gina's assistance with a difficult interrogation. Andy Samberg stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt and Peralta contract mumps during an investigation, so the pair elect to be quarantined together in the hope that they can use the time to solve the case. Diaz tries to help Boyle through the mourning process for his dog, and Jeffords is forced to clean up Hitchcock and Scully's mess. Oscar Nunez guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Santiago are excited to go on their first real holiday together, but their perfectly planned cruise ship itinerary is thwarted when they discover that an old adversary is on board. Boyle and Diaz vie for the same apartment, while Gina and Jeffords help Captain Holt to survive a visit from his sister Debbie

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard becomes convinced he has met his soulmate in the form of surgeon Stephanie Barnett, but he fails to realise she is far more interested in Leonard. Meanwhile, Sheldon and Raj argue about what to watch on TV. Sara Rue guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is delighted that Leonard has finally managed to find a girlfriend who meets his high standards, but his over-exuberance looks set to cause problems. Jim Parsons and Johnny Galecki star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard turns to Penny for advice when his relationship with Stephanie takes off faster than he would have liked, and he realises he is the last person to notice that she has moved in with him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon's obsession with gift-giving etiquette annoys his friends as Christmas approaches. Meanwhile, Leonard is thrilled to meet an award-winning scientist, only to be filled with jealousy when his new colleague takes an interest in Penny. With guest star Michael Trucco (Battlestar Galactica, One Tree Hill)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and the gang are excited when Barry Kripke challenges them to a robot duel. Meanwhile, Howard is devastated when Penny finally tells him what she thinks of his chauvinism. Guest starring John Ross Bowie

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: The award-winning celebrity challenge comes to the Channel 4 network, with Greg Davies as the all-powerful Taskmaster and Alex Horne (the show's creator) as his sidekick, setting all manner of perplexing and downright extraordinary tasks for five contestants from the comedy world - Johnny Vegas, Katherine Parkinson, Daisy May Cooper, Mawaan Rizwan and Richard Herring. They'll be facing giant bears, disappearing cows and flying eggs as they begin their campaign to win the ultimate prize - Greg's golden head

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee II (1988)
programme.desc: The rugged Australian adventurer sets out to save his reporter girlfriend from New York drug dealers. Having rescued her from their clutches, he realises they will soon be coming after him - so he decides to even the odds by luring them to the Outback for a final showdown. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Paul Hogan, Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Charles S Dutton

programme.title: Ghostbusters (2016)
programme.desc: When a series of supernatural disturbances occurs in New York City, two experts in the paranormal investigate, joined by a brilliant inventor who has created an array of ghost-hunting gadgets and a public transport worker whose knowledge of the city provides vital clues to the sinister cause of the ghostly activity. Reboot of the 1980s comedy franchise, starring Kristen Wiig, Melissa McCarthy, Kate McKinnon, Leslie Jones and Chris Hemsworth

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to put his formidable brain power to use in devising a scientific procedure for making friends. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Alison and her daughter Paula are looking for a holiday home that feels traditionally Spanish. Presenter Jasmine Harman shows them five properties around Velez-Malaga for their budget of £60,000

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole decides that he needs to restore a forklift truck, while Simon O'Brien gets all zen with a stone water feature

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: Henry Cole and Simon O'Brien head to Lancashire where Simon finds a 1980s glass cabinet he wants to turn into a modern grandfather clock. Henry picks up a drum kit and decides to relive his youth

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel transforms the attic into a studio and storage space for her vintage treasures and takes Dorothy on a trip to Paris, while Dick has his own plans for repurposing some ancient tools he finds in the outbuildings. The couple throws a surprise birthday celebration for Angel's mother, where Dick's purpose-built open-fire popcorn maker is put to the test

programme.title: Building the Dream
programme.desc: Charlie Luxton revisits Liz and Robin Leonard, who planed to self-build a three-bedroom home in Hastings, East Sussex, with a view of the coast. However, they chose to ignore every piece of advice he gave them and their outlandish ideas led to lavish spending

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit is to the 12th-century Oxenham Arms, Devon, where owners Simon and Lyn Powell hope to kick-off the competition in style. The guests participate in broom dancing and after throwing some moves, the hosts have fellow contestant John pegged as the one to watch

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners visit the Elegant House bed and breakfast in Liverpool on their second night, where host John Brady hopes his unique property will stand out from the crowd. Nikki and David get to grips with the unconventional facilities, and David reveals his background as a hotel inspector - with Amanda making her opinions on the star rating system very clear

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to Monmouthshire, where Peter and Amanda Copp want to rope their guests into the world of 'glamping' at Hidden Valley Yurts. John has a hairy encounter in his yurt, and the shared bathroom facilities fail to impress David and Nikki. The next morning, the DIY breakfast proves underwhelming for some, while the hosts discover that the great outdoors is not everyone's cup of tea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Former hotel inspector and owner David Stanbridge and manager Nikki Deans welcome the contestants to the Cley Hall Hotel in Spalding, Lincolnshire. Peter and Amanda are impressed by their room, but Simon and Lyn are unhappy with the state of the carpet. The next morning, the guests decide to put their eight-minute breakfast rule to the test, and some of them have concerns about Nikki's waitressing skills

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet for the final time to find out what they've been paid and confront their critics. Simon and Lyn kick off proceedings by demanding answers from John about his disturbed night's sleep, but then find themselves taken to task by David over their cleanliness feedback. However, the former hotel inspector receives his own interrogation from Peter and Amanda, who want to know why he didn't praise their shared bathroom facilities. Tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: The Secret Life of the Zoo
programme.desc: Four Sumatran orang-utans escape from their quarters, and tempting them back inside proves easier said than done, while the dominant female meerkat faces trouble from her daughter, who is launching physical attacks upon her mother. A young Asian elephant keeps the rest of the herd entertained as they adapt to the loss of two members to a virus. The keepers believe it needs a playmate its own age, but their hopes rest on the bull elephant mating with the females once more

programme.title: Kirstie and Phil's Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet a couple in Rushden in Northamptonshire who are unsure whether they should renovate their current home or sell up and move into another. Susan and John are torn over their unique five-bed character home, so Kirstie and Phil offer their expert advice in an effort to help them make the right decision for their family's future

programme.title: Escape to the Chateau
programme.desc: Angel redesigns the rooms in one of the chateau's turrets with a fruits and flowers motif - but an unexpected surprise lurks behind her creations. Outside, Dick is putting together a parkour fitness trail in the 12 acres of grounds, but hits upon an unexpected obstacle buried deep underground

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Londoner Chris Ostwald decides to build a New England-style water mill in the Chilterns, on a hill and nowhere near any water, after being inspired by an illustration on a yoghurt pot. He bought the plot 20 years previously and it has always been his dream to build a retreat for himself and his family. Everything seems to be going smoothly, until a neighbour complains the house is breaking its planning consent. Kevin McCloud presents

programme.title: 23 Cases
programme.desc: Tara receives an anonymous warning to stop further investigation into the murders, but she is not deterred. Only Rapp knows who sent the message - and he can't resist digging for more about Tara's personal life, leaving her feeling exposed. Thriller, starring Shadi Hedayati and Franz Dinda. In German

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Train driver Andy, 48, is rushed in after falling 12ft from a tree while cutting branches and landing on his feet, badly fracturing both ankles, and doctors are concerned the impact may have caused life-changing damage to critical nerves and blood vessels in his feet and legs. Angela, 59, has come to St George's as her heart has been beating at over 150bpm for eight hours, risking stroke and other complications. Cardiologist Dr Arun's attempts to bring down her pulse using a powerful drug aren't successful, so he decides to electrically shock her heart to reset it

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Five-year-old Isa is rushed to A&E after being hit by a car and trapped underneath it, and doctors suspect the impact may have caused serious internal damage, as well as significant head injuries. Meanwhile, 26-year-old Tom is treated after slicing through his leg with a circular saw, with medics fearing the blade has cut so deeply into the muscle tissue that it could starve his leg of blood. Plus, 85-year-old retired actor Donald comes to the hospital with pain in his bladder, and consultant Faheem is concerned there may be an infection

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: In Cambridgeshire, the heli-medics race to treat a young cyclist with a time-critical brain injury. On the Norfolk Broads, holidaymaker Tom breaks his thigh bone jumping off a boat, while Cedric, an 87-year-old pilot, is put into an induced coma after he crashes his microlight in Cumbria

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton helps Chris and Lynne find a holiday home in Spain they can use for family holidays, showing them five properties around Mojácar for their budget of £80,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Former policeman Steve McGibbon looks for the perfect holiday home on Fuerteventura, where he can spend time with his daughter Madison, on a £120,000 budget. Ben Hillman presents

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Bettina and Eamon have spent nearly 30 years in military accommodation moving with Eamon's job. They are now ready to start the next chapter of their lives by buying the first property they will have bought together. They have chosen the Costa Calida in Spain and are hoping one of the five properties Danni Menzies has found within their £100,000 budget prove be perfect for them

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with two young couples who were looking to take their all-important first steps on the property ladder in London. First, Phil meets Cat and Ed, who were searching for a home in the area around Chiswick, before revisiting Ian and Sarah, who were in love with the idea of finding a property in Balham

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud meets a couple who have spent the past 15 years planning their dream home. They have taken inspiration from their travels around the world, particularly visits to America and Japan, and plan to create a highly individual wooden-framed house in the New Forest, Hampshire

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Surrey, five cooks from the Woking and Weybridge area battle to win the culinary contest's £1,000 prize. The first to host is Vincenzo Ferlita, who works in an ice-cream van. Staying true to his Italian and Sicilian roots, he hopes that his wealth of family recipes will impress his guests

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Canadian housewife and craft-maker Sarah Maynard is second to play host in the Woking and Weybridge area, and hopes to impress her guests by serving up a three-course Turkish feast. However, the lavish spread needs a lot of preparation time, and she must hope it turns out as presentable as she plans it to be

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Riot policeman Steve Carvill hosts the third dinner party in Woking and Weybridge in Surrey, and hopes that a night of fine food and fun will impress his guests. He takes no prisoners with his menu, rustling up home-made pasta and white chocolate panna cotta from scratch for his four unsuspecting diners, who are expecting fast food rather than fine dining

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: It is the turn of gardener Sara Gilding on the fourth night in Woking and Weybridge in Surrey, but it is her first time hosting a dinner party in more than 20 years. Guest Vincenzo Ferlita is not looking forward to the evening, while Steve Carvill hopes he will get some respite from Sara's flirtatious advances

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Children's entertainer Kelly Cummins hosts the final party from Woking and Weybridge in Surrey, and the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced. The guests keep their fingers crossed that dog-loving Sara Gilding does not return to her critical ways, while a bout of flatulence provides some comic relief

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first visit of the week is to the Miners Arms in Nenthead, Cumbria, where sisters Alison Baker and Lynda Clark hope to impress guests with their eco credentials

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Brothers Andrew and James Widdas run the Rose and Crown in Edgworth, near Bolton, and hope to provide boutique on a budget, but veterans Alison and Lynda are quick to find fault

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: At Float by Boat near Rugby, partners Kev Argent and Tor Johnson run mindfulness breaks from their narrowboat, but Alison and Lynda are not keen on the tiny shared bathroom

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: A fell runner breaks her leg in the Ochil Hills, while Portscatho Coastguard Rescue Team abseil down a cliff to save Remi the dog, after her overenthusiastic chase for rabbits. It's a busy day in the Lakes for the Keswick Mountain Rescue team, as they are called to the same location twice to help injured walkers

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Ashleigh is rushed to St George's by ambulance after twisting her leg while playing football. X-rays reveal that her femur is broken and she will need surgery. Meanwhile, three-year-old Lola visits A&E with her dad after having a seizure, and 91-year-old Betty arrives with severe chest pain. Doctors carry out a blood test in order to find out whether she is having a heart attack and will require life-saving surgery

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Barrie, 78, is rushed in with breathing difficulties and tests reveal he has fluid on his lungs and faces serious medical treatment, while 75-year-old David is treated after falling down a flight of stairs, and 82-year-old Bob is admitted after a DIY accident at home

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.title: Father Ted

programme.desc: The meets a pair of newlyweds who instead of a honeymoon spent their money on an old army truck, which they plan to transform into a mobile holiday home, and a master craftsman in Dorset making an eco-friendly luxury treehouse - complete with sauna, spiral staircase and even a slide. In New Zealand, George visits a hilltop beach house overlooking the Pacific, and as ever he and old friend Will Hardie embark on another series-long project - this time to build a gravity-defying, rotating home inspired by vintage sci-fi comics

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dairy farmer's wife and Disney enthusiast Charlene Fry-Henderson hosts the first dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, where she hopes that her locally reared meat, home cooking, and entertainment involving a plastic cow will secure her the £1,000 prize. Her guests are local radio presenter Tommy Jardine, banker Olive Melville, prison custody officer Tammy Rice and trainee teacher Josh Jones

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Horse enthusiast and banker Olive Melville hosts the second dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, where she hopes to impress her guests with a crab starter and mousse dessert - but things take a turn for the worse when a conversation about the royal family divides the diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Local radio DJ Tommy Jardine hosts the third dinner party in Dumfries and Galloway, and prepares chicken stuffed with haggis - but first he must continue a family tradition and rustle up a sheep for his entertainment. Tommy then tries to impress his guests with a touch of celebrity name-dropping, but young dance DJ and trainee teacher Josh trumps him at his own game

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee teacher and club DJ Josh Jones hosts the fourth night in Dumfries and Galloway, and hopes he can broaden his fellow contestants' palates with his menu of Indian food. He plans lamb pasanda and tandoori monkfish, but Tammy Rice finds something in her glass that wasn't on the menu. However, Josh hopes his disco entertainment might impress the guests enough to bag him the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me

The dinner-party novice rustles up chorizo and cous cous stuffed peppers for her starter and incorporates haggis into her chicken-based main course

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the White Lodge Hotel in Filey, North Yorkshire, where hosts James and Kim Hodgson hope their love of high standards will win over their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the Old Red Lion Country Inn in Upper Poppleton, North Yorkshire, where pair Mark and Jean Lee hope their plain and simple pub B&B will impress their guests

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contest ends at glamping site Camp Katur in Kirklington, North Yorkshire, where Kerry Roy and Nicola Wilding hope to wow their guests with their unique 'geodomes' and see-through pods

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the contest arrives, and while Amanda Lucia-Charley and Alan Talbot receive harsh criticism of their breakfast, Mark and Jean Lee's decor receives scathing reviews

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Divorce lawyer Michelle Camacho hosts the first dinner party in south London, where she hopes that her 1970s menu of duck a l'orange and coleslaw, vegetables and a Bloody Mary sorbet for dessert will help to secure her the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Pub manager and artist Matt Wren hosts the second evening in south London, but his dinner party is beset by disasters in the kitchen and arguing guests at the dinner table when Michelle and Licia have a spat. However, one of the five takes a liking to another of the contestants

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Licia Snow hosts the third party in south London, and hopes to impress her guests with rustic and homely touches during her laid-back evening. However, her relaxed and calm approach could be threatened when she clashes with Michelle at the dinner table

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Raphael Steele hosts the fourth night in south London and hopes that his first-ever dinner party will be a success. He plans a Caribbean evening based on old family recipes featuring ackee, saltfish and curried goat, and organises steel drum music for entertainment

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Swedish businesswoman Charlotte Sundberg hosts the final party in south London. Her tactics are to present a night full of schnapps, folk songs and classic cuisine from her Scandinavian homeland, which she hopes will help her scoop the cash prize

programme.title: Autumn at Jimmy's Farm
programme.desc: Following life on Jimmy Doherty's farm during the autumn months, as the team prepare the farm and wildlife park for the oncoming seasonal changes. The team awaits the arrival of some new, and unpredictable, animals which could prove a handful for Jimmy and the rangers. Meanwhile, wildlife in the woodland starts to harvest the summer's bounty to get ready for winter

programme.title: Emergency Rescue: Air, Land & Sea
programme.desc: In the Lake District, walker Philip calls on the Patterdale Mountain Rescue Team when a hike in the hills ends in a nasty break. Newquay Search and Rescue team prepare for a special visitor at base. And coastguard rescue teams work together to help Chrissy, who is seriously injured on a cliff near Cape Cornwall

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

Meanwhile, 83-year-old widower Harry arrives with shortness of breath, chest pains and dizziness after collapsing while shopping. Paediatric nurse Kelly, who loves working with children, treats six-year-old Lilly, who has cut her head after falling off her scooter

programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of a Jaguar XJ and races against the rotation of the Earth. James May travels to America to drive a Nasa Space Exploration Vehicle and Richard Hammond tests two of the most famous supercars of the 1980s - the Porsche 959 and the Ferrari F40. John Prescott is the Star in a Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Jeremy Clarkson gets behind the wheel of the Ferrari F12 Berlinetta, sampling the punch of its 730bhp V12 engine on the open roads of Scotland. Richard Hammond harnesses the power of motorsport on a quest to find the world's best taxi, and James May pays tribute to the former BBC Television Centre in White City, London, using a motorcyclist and a pair of parkour runners. Plus, the BAC Mono - an astonishingly fast car with just one seat - is put through its paces on the test track, and film director Ron Howard goes for a spin in the new Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: Rick Stein's Long Weekends
programme.desc: The chef heads to Cadiz in Spain, where he samples two of the city's most revered culinary stars - fresh tuna and Manzanilla sherry. Rick is captivated by the narrow winding streets as he walks in the footsteps of the ancient Phoenician and Arab traders, whose influence on the city can still be seen to this day. Back home, he prepares flamenco eggs and arroz verde, or green rice, made with garlic, parsley, clams and prawns, producing the vibrant colours of the Spanish flag

programme.title: Top Gear
programme.desc: Richard Hammond is dropped into the remote, frozen wastes of Canada to test a watch with a built-in emergency beacon. The distress signal is sent directly to Jeremy Clarkson and James May, who get their hands on two machines and set off on an epic adventure to find their colleague. Plus, Jeremy puts the new 471bhp Lexus RC F coupe thought its paces, while The Fall and The X-Files star Gillian Anderson takes to the track in the Reasonably Priced Car

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Celebrities undertake journeys on some of the most perilous routes in the world. In Alaska, Sue Perkins and Charley Boorman drive along the notorious Dalton Highway, a dirt track originally constructed in the 1970s as a supply road for the Trans-Alaska oil pipeline. The pair struggle to cope with the Arctic conditions and constant threat of avalanches, but receive help from experienced truckers who teach them some unwritten rules for surviving the road's many hazards

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.title: Gavin & Stacey

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert and Greg Davies negotiate a variety of unusual hazards as they travel through Nepal, a country with one of the world's highest rates of road traffic accidents. Frequent floods and landslides mean car journeys are often fraught with danger, and matters are not helped by the varied states of Nepalese roads, which range from urban highways to crumbling mountain passes

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Noel Fielding for a quickfire 48-hour break in Danish capital Copenhagen, where they join a cycle tour of the city, sample some stunning sandwiches and visit an underground art gallery. They also find the time for a trip to the Tivoli Gardens and taste Danish pastries and beer at the Carlsberg Brewery

programme.title: Travel Man: 48 Hours In
programme.desc: Richard Ayoade is joined by Greg Davies for two days in Moscow. The pair's first port of call in the Russian capital is Red Square, where their appreciation of the Kremlin, St Basil's and Lenin's tomb is rudely interrupted as the tanks roll by at rehearsals for a military parade. They also visit the Cosmonaut Museum and try genuine space food, followed by a visit to one of the strangest circuses in the world

programme.title: Have I Got a Bit More News for You

programme.desc: David Mitchell is joined by MasterChef judge Gregg Wallace and actor Nigel Havers, while Lee Mack teams up with writer and comedian Charlie Brooker and actress Nina Wadia, as the comedy panel show hosted by Rob Brydon continues

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: Paul Hollywood delves into his family history, finding out about his maternal grandfather's experiences in the Second World War, serving as an anti-aircraft gunner in Tunisia and Italy. The Great British Bake Off judge then digs deeper, learning about his Scottish ancestry - and how one of his forebears held down a very demanding job

programme.title: Who Do You Think You Are?
programme.desc: British-born actress Jane Seymour knows there is Jewish ancestry on her father's side of the family, but beyond that she knows very little, other than her own suspicions that they suffered in the Holocaust. As she researches her paternal great-aunts Jadwiga and Michaela, she soon finds out more about their experiences under Nazi occupation. The search takes her to Warsaw and France, uncovering stories of life in a ghetto and a terrifying flight to Switzerland from the Germans

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.desc: Jamie Theakston journeys to Greece and Italy to uncover the truth about oracles - mythical figures who could reputedly hear and speak to gods

programme.title: Adolf Hitler's War
programme.desc: As Hitler's troops advance, occupants in Ukraine, Belarus and Poland take the brunt of the occupying forces cruelty; and the first concentration camps are created

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team return to examine more items brought in by viewers, beginning with a visit to Plas Newydd Country House and Gardens on Anglesey. Collectibles assessed include a Victorian cane carved with an image of the Menai suspension bridge, an 18th century grandmother clock, and two giant toy giraffes

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering
programme.desc: The stories behind an abandoned Second World War aviation facility in Farnborough, a Soviet airbase in the Gobi Desert, and a disused furnace in Pittsburgh

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo enjoys a ukulele lesson in Haddington, East Lothian, birthplace of the Victorian self-improvement guru Samuel Smiles. In Musselburgh, he gets a taste of life as a fishwife, before exploring Edinburgh where a popular 19th-century mode of transport is making a comeback. Michael also visits the Royal College of Surgeons, where he discovers the macabre history of body snatchers and murderers and heads onwards to the University of Edinburgh Medical School, to learn how students use sophisticated technology to study anatomy

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys
programme.desc: Michael Portillo travels from Blackpool to Manchester, along the way unveiling a monument to 87 railwaymen of the London and North Western Railway who died in the Great War

programme.title: Impossible Engineering
programme.desc: How the world's biggest ship, designed to install oil platforms and lay pipelines, was inspired by a logging machine, a wire rope and 1940s shipbuilding techniques

programme.title: Abandoned Engineering

The latest stage ends at Silkstone Common, where he tracks down the forge where a Victorian metallurgist created wrought iron axles strong enough for railway rolling stock

programme.title: Great British Railway Journeys

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Barmaid Laura Leibo hosts the second party in Medway, Kent, but struggles to cope with the stresses of the task. She hopes her improvised cheesecake and questionable gravy will be forgotten when she invites her guests to take part in a robotic dance-off in her kitchen - with Nina Gaskell grabbing the opportunity to show off a hidden talent

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Police communications officer Esther Kennedy hosts the third dinner party in Medway, Kent. She has very high standards and believes everything has to be just so, with nice cutlery, matching plates and impeccable glassware. But the key thing is her gourmet menu, which may or may not prove a hit with her fellow diners. However, Esther does end the night by treating her guests to an impromptu rock performance

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Actor Patrick Fysh hosts the fourth dinner party in Kent, and hopes to impress with his molecular gastronomy. However, Michael Dodsworth is confused by the 21-year-old's interest in surrealist feminist art, and Nina Gaskell is left speechless by risque pictures of his girlfriend

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Michael Dodsworth hosts the final dinner party in Medway, Kent, and decides to keep his menu simple by preparing Thai chicken cakes, jambalaya and raspberry and lime sorbet. He also arranges games including pinata, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: IT architect Anna hosts the first of a week of dinner parties from in and around Cardiff, hoping to impress her guests with a culinary journey celebrating classic British cooking

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: On day two in Cardiff, accountant Charlotte is going all out to impress and has spent the cash on a menu of luxury ingredients in her bid to scoop the £1,000 prize

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Beautician Claire hosts the third dinner party in Cardiff, but her decision to serve her favourite dishes on planks instead of plates proves controversial

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Part-time football referee Scott serves up a menu of family favourites in Cardiff, but might have scored an own goal by putting cheese in every course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night in Cardiff sees restaurateur Giovanni cook a menu from his native Italy as he bids to wow guests Anna, Charlotte, Scott and Claire - and scoop the £1,000 prize. Giovanni knows his arch-rival Charlotte is looking for payback after he criticised her night earlier in the week, but when the others spy his massive and complex dishes, they wonder if he's tried too hard to impress

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part two of two. The chef continues his quest to transform the fortunes of the Burger Kitchen in Los Angeles, where tensions were running high because owner Alan Saffron had spent his son's entire inheritance on the struggling restaurant. Alan gets a wake-up call from internet critics, who he believes are trying to shut him down

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay visits family-run Luigi's in Orange County, California, where lazy shortcuts following the retirement of the owner's father have led the business to suffer. Ramsay faces the daunting task of reuniting a feuding family, before turning around the struggling restaurant, which currently has 126 dishes on the menu

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Greek at the Harbour restaurant in southern California, where owner Makis Mikelatos works 17 hours a day, seven days a week, but is unwilling to let his son Ari take the reins. Gordon sets out to get to the bottom of Makis's reluctance to teach his son, and uncovers a shocking family secret

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to Mike & Nellie's Steakhouse in Oakhurst, New Jersey, where owner Mike Farber is mourning his father Nellie, who was also his business partner. Having been called in by the restaurateur's two daughters, Gordon faces the task of getting him to focus on his business, before tackling the bigger problem of rotting decor and a less-than-appealing menu

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off
programme.desc: The competition starts to heat up during Chocolate Week, as Prue Leith and Paul Hollywood set three tricky challenges to test the remaining bakers. There's a deceptively simple traybake in the Signature, a Technical packed full of chocolate and nuts, and a celebration Showstopper that pushes the bakers' skills with white chocolate to the limit. Who will impress Prue and Paul enough to keep their place in the tent, and who will be heading home? Presented by Matt Lucas and Noel Fielding

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, with cameras capturing their instant reactions and the lively discussions that are prompted by the week's biggest and best shows

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Following three patients who have miraculously survived when the odds were stacked against them, including a motorcyclist who was thrown under a car after crashing into a bus. Elsewhere, cameras follow ex-paratrooper Martin, who has sustained multiple injuries to his neck, pelvis and legs after his paraglider was blown into the hillside during a flight, and 10-month-old Erin, who has a build-up of wax in her ear following a fever

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the rising incidence of theft in Northamptonshire, where in 2018 burglaries hit a five-year high. PC Imogen Robinson chases a prolific shoplifter who has stolen a box of chocolate bars from a shop. PC Ben Norris is dispatched to apprehend a suspected burglar who then carries out a rooftop protest

programme.title: The Great British Bake Off: An Extra Slice
programme.desc: Jo Brand is joined by guests Vic Reeves, Melvin Odoom and Steph McGovern as they dip their fingers into Chocolate Week. Regular contributor Tom Allen reviews some of the handiwork offered up by a select group of home bakers and reveals the disastrous bakes viewers have created in their own kitchens. Plus, exclusive unseen clips from the tent and an interview with the latest baker to leave the competition

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Fashion journalist Robert Johnston hosts the first dinner party in south London, serving Stilton ice-cream and tomato sorbet, slow-roasted pork with chilli and fennel, and Sephardic orange and almond cake

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Trainee aqua-aerobics instructor Jennifer Joseph hosts the second dinner party in south London, preparing a mountain of home-cooked Caribbean food and asking her guests to dress in hoodies and jeans. However, her plans to create a relaxed atmosphere fail when Joe Kempster's incessant chatter begins to annoy the other diners

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Bricklayer Joe Kempster hosts the third dinner party in south London. He prides himself on making all his dishes from scratch and hopes to compensate for past misunderstandings with the other guests by preparing a meal featuring a mystery Greek main course

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Hospital technician Karen Hill hosts the penultimate dinner party in south London. She hopes to impress her guests by preparing seven dishes, including Chinese duck, French pate, Greek lamb, Turkish rice and American cheesecake - but the extensive menu causes her problems

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Majid Ravandi hosts the final dinner party in south London, but fails to impress with a hot prawn starter and a dry main course. As the meal progresses, a bickering Joe and Karen threaten to spoil the cook's friendly demeanour, before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Simon O'Brien presents as Raja and Zoe - strangers from Kidderminster who have never owned a home before - are given a lump sum to buy a property, then renovate and sell it

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: Sheepdog trainer Osian and quantity surveyor Elen meet first the first time as they step into the auction room to buy a property in north Wales. Presented by Simon O'Brien

programme.title: The Great House Giveaway
programme.desc: A property valuer and teaching assistant meet for the first time as they buy a house together at auction in Merseyside - then have six months to renovate and sell it for a profit

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies helps Chris and Marie who are looking for the perfect place to enjoy their retirement in Manilva on Spain's Costa del Sol, with a budget of £125,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jonnie Irwin meets holistic therapist Daniela from East Yorkshire, who is looking to find a property on the coastline of western Madeira and has a budget of £100,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Scarlette Douglas helps Maureen search for a property with a terrace and sea views in the town of Mojacar on the Costa de Almeria

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sean and Ian would love a holiday home on Gran Canaria near their favourite town of Vecindario. Laura Hamilton lines up five properties within their budget of £125,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman examines the least developed area of the Costa del Sol on behalf of Sue and Brian, who visit Spain every year and have fallen in love with its traditional culture and outdoor lifestyle. The pair now want to spend up to six months at a time in Axarquía, but need to find a suitable property to call home

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California.
